site-title: Title of the tool shown in the browser tab
site-header-title: Header title of the tool, shown at the top of every page. "Earwig's" is the author's username. "Copyvio Detector" should be bolded.
log-in: Label for the login link in the header
log-out: Title attribute for the logout link in the header
settings: Label for the settings link in the header
maintained-by: Footer text with a link to the author's user page. $1 is the complete HTML link to the author's user page.
api: Link to the API documentation page
source-code: Link to the source code repository
background-image: Link to the background image description page
page-title-search: Suffix for the browser tab title when viewing a search result
page-title-compare: Suffix for the browser tab title when viewing a compare result
page-title-settings: Suffix for the browser tab title on the settings page
page-title-login: Suffix for the browser tab title on the login page
page-title-logout: Suffix for the browser tab title on the logout page
page-title-error: Suffix for the browser tab title on the error page
login-required: Message explaining that the user needs to log in via OAuth to use the search engine
login-error: Error message displayed when login fails. $1 is the error message.
after-logging-in: Beginning of a sentence explaining what happens after login
check-will-be-run: Part of a sentence, follows 'after-logging-in'. Used when the user was about to run a search.
will-be-redirected-to: Part of a sentence, follows 'after-logging-in'. Used when the user was on another page.
logout-message: Explanation of what logging out does
error-description: Instructions for the user when an unexpected error occurs. Contains links to GitHub issues and email. $1 is the GitHub issues list URL, $2 is the new issue URL, $3 is the author's email URL.
error-bad-site-confirm: Link text for confirming a wiki site's URL.
search-error-retry: Link text for retrying a search without the search engine.
settings-default-site: Section heading for default wiki site selection
settings-background: Section heading for background image selection
settings-background-list: Description for the 'list' background option. Contains several links. $1 is the POTD subset URL, $2 is the Wikimedia Commons URL, $3 is the Pictures of the Day URL.
settings-background-potd: Description for the 'POTD' (Picture of the Day) background option
settings-save: Label for the save settings button
settings-updated: Confirmation message shown after settings are saved. $1 is a comma-separated list of changed settings.
form-site: Label for the site selection dropdown in the search form
form-language: Title attribute for the language dropdown
form-project: Title attribute for the project dropdown
form-page: Label for the page title input
form-title-placeholder: Placeholder text for the page title input
form-title-tooltip: Tooltip for the page title input
form-or: Separator label between the title and revision ID inputs
form-revision-id-placeholder: Placeholder text for the revision ID input
form-revision-id-tooltip: Tooltip for the revision ID input
form-url-placeholder: Placeholder text for the URL input
form-url-tooltip: Tooltip for the URL input in compare mode
form-copyvio-search: Label for the 'search' radio button, selecting copyvio search mode
form-copyvio-compare: Label for the 'compare' radio button, selecting copyvio compare mode
form-use-search-engine: Label for the checkbox to enable/disable Google search engine
form-use-links: Label for the checkbox to enable/disable checking external links in the page
form-use-turnitin: Label for the checkbox to enable/disable Turnitin integration (currently disabled)
form-bypass-cache: Label for the checkbox to bypass cached results
error-bad-action: Error shown when an unknown action is submitted. $1 is the action name.
error-no-search-method: Error shown when neither search engine nor page links are selected for checking
error-invalid-oldid: Error shown when the revision ID is not a valid integer. $1 is the invalid ID.
error-no-url: Error shown when no URL is provided for compare mode
error-unsupported-uri: Error shown when the URL has an unsupported URI scheme. $1 is the URL.
error-no-data: Error shown when no text could be extracted from a URL. $1 is the URL.
error-timeout: Error shown when a URL times out. $1 is the URL.
error-search-error: Error shown when the search engine fails. $1 is the error cause. $2 is a URL to retry without search engine.
error-unknown: Fallback error message for unrecognized error codes
error-bad-site: Error shown when the wiki site does not exist. $1 is the project code, $2 is the language code, $3 is a URL to confirm.
error-revision-not-found: Error shown when the revision ID is not found. $1 is the URL, $2 is the revision ID.
error-page-not-found: Error shown when the page is not found. $1 is the URL, $2 is the page title.
intro-paragraph-1: First introductory paragraph explaining what the tool does (search mode vs compare mode). $1 is a link to the copyright violations page. Contains several hardcoded links: Google, Turnitin, EranBot, Duplication Detector.
intro-paragraph-1-copyvio-url: URL of the copyright violations page on the local Wikipedia.
intro-copyright-violations: Link text for the copyright violations page (WP:COPYVIO).
intro-paragraph-2: Second introductory paragraph about performance and timeouts
intro-paragraph-3: Third introductory paragraph explaining caution with results and the excluded URL list. $1 is a link to the excluded URL list page.
intro-exclusions-list: Link text for the excluded URL list page.
cached-line: Cached results sentence (compare mode). $1 is the tooltip text for the <abbr> around 'cached'. $2 is a complete '<abbr>' with the time difference (e.g. '1 hour ago'). $3 is the generation time in seconds.
cached-line-search: Cached results sentence (search mode). $1 is the tooltip text for the <abbr> around 'cached'. $2 is a complete '<abbr>' with the time difference (e.g. '1 hour ago'). $3 is the generation time. $4 is the search query count (PLURAL).
cached-tooltip: Tooltip text for the 'cached' <abbr> element in the cached results sentence.
check-results-time: Generation time sentence (compare mode). $1 is the time in seconds.
check-results-time-search: Generation time sentence (search mode). $1 is the time. $2 is the search query count (PLURAL).
permalink: Label for a permanent link to the check results
violation-suspected: Label indicating a copyright violation is suspected
violation-possible: Label indicating a copyright violation is possible
violation-unlikely: Label indicating a copyright violation is unlikely
no-violation: Label indicating no copyright violation was found
similarity: Label below the similarity percentage score
no-matches-found: Text shown when no matching sources were found
redirected-from: Notice that the page was redirected from another title. $1 is the redirect page URL, $2 is the original title, $3 is the URL to check the original.
redirected-from-check-original: Link text for checking the original (non-redirected) page.
attribution-warning: Warning when the article contains an attribution template. $1 is the URL to the template, $2 is the template name.
turnitin-no-matches: Text shown when Turnitin found no matching sources
turnitin-report: Label for a Turnitin report link. $1 is the report ID.
turnitin-report-link: Turnitin report link with timestamp. $1 is the report ID, $2 is the diff URL, $3 is the timestamp string.
turnitin-source: Turnitin source match description. $1 is the percentage, $2 is the word count, $3 is the source URL.
checked-sources: Section heading for the list of checked sources
table-url: Column header for the URL column in the sources table
table-similarity: Column header for the similarity column in the sources table
table-compare: Column header for the compare action column in the sources table
source-excluded: Label shown next to a source that was excluded from checking
source-skipped: Label shown next to a source that was skipped
no-sources-checked: Text shown when no sources were checked
urls-hidden: Notice that some URLs are hidden. $1 is the count of hidden URLs. Followed by a separate 'Show them.' link.
urls-hidden-show: Link text to reveal hidden URLs.
search-ended-early: Notice that the search ended early due to a high-similarity match. $1 is a URL to re-run with a complete check.
search-ended-early-retry: Link text for re-running with a complete check after the search ended early.
article-label: Label for the article text in the comparison view
source-label: Label for the source text in the comparison view
compare-action: Link text to compare a specific source URL
ago-seconds: Time duration in seconds. $1 is the count (PLURAL). Example: '5 seconds ago'.
ago-minutes: Time duration in minutes. $1 is the count (PLURAL). Example: '2 minutes ago'.
ago-hours: Time duration in hours. $1 is the count (PLURAL). Example: '1 hour ago'.
